data.title: Pixelverse evolves with Web3 Arcade launch on Base and Farcaster
data.description:
In this post: Pixelverse has transitioned from its Telegram tap-to-earn platform to a Web3 social arcade with the launch of Pixelverse Arcade on Base and Farcaster. The company said the initiative is part of its plan to bring deeper on-chain features, collectibles, and integrations with meme-native projects to its platform. According to the report, Pixelverse […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pixelverse-evolves-with-web3-arcade-launch-on-base-and-farcaster/

data.title: Bank of Italy calls for tighter rules on global multi-issuance stablecoins
data.description:
The Bank of Italy vice director warned that multi-issuance stablecoins pose risks to EU financial stability and should be restricted to equivalent jurisdictions.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/multi-issuance-stablecoins-should-be-limited-to-equivalently-regulated-jurisdictions?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed's Kashkari Discusses Potential Rate Adjustments Amid Economic Conditions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari stated that if the labor market weakens more than anticipated, the Fed could expedite interest rate cuts. He noted that it is unlikely for inflation to significantly exceed 3% due to tariffs. Kashkari expressed willingness to raise policy rates if economic conditions necessitate such action. He suggested that the neutral interest rate might have increased to 3.1% and remarked that the Fed's policy is not as restrictive as previously thought. While inflation may persist, a substantial rise is considered improbable.

data.title: WLFI Protocol Implements Permanent Token Burn Strategy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, World Liberty Financial's proposal to use all fees generated from WLFI protocol-owned liquidity (POL) for public market buybacks and permanent token destruction has been approved, with 99.84% of voters in favor.

The term 'protocol-owned liquidity' refers exclusively to fees generated from liquidity controlled by WLFI, excluding fees from community and third-party liquidity providers. Essentially, WLFI collects fees from its liquidity positions on Ethereum, BSC, and Solana chains, using these fees to repurchase WLFI tokens in the market. The repurchased tokens are then sent to a burn address, resulting in a permanent reduction in supply.

The official statement indicates that if the proposal is implemented, WLFI will use this as the foundation for a continuous buyback and burn strategy. As the ecosystem develops, there are plans to explore incorporating other protocol revenue sources into this initiative, gradually expanding the scale of WLFI buybacks and token destruction.

data.title: Pump.fun live streaming concept coins plummeted, with the leading market value only $5 million.
data.description: According to OKX Wallet data, the value of Pump.fun live-streaming concept tokens has plummeted, leaving only six with a market capitalization exceeding $1 million. Bagwork, previously the leading token, boasted a market capitalization exceeding $50 million, but is now reported at $5 million, a 90% drop. The live-streaming concept token with the highest market capitalization is KIND, currently reported at $6 million.

data.description:

data.title: Bank of Italy calls for clear EU rules for cross-border stablecoins
data.description:
Chiara Scotti, deputy governor of the Bank of Italy, warns that without unified rules, cross-border stablecoins could create legal, operational and stability risks for European markets.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/europe/bank-of-italy-calls-for-clear-eu-rules-for-cross-border-stablecoins/

data.title: MKR holders rush to swap to new Sky Protocol tokens ahead of penalties
data.description:
All late holders of MKR will have to pay a 1% penalty when upgrading to SKY, the new token of the SKY protocol. Binance already delisted MKR and upgraded all user funds to SKY.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mkr-holders-swap-sky-protocol/

data.title: Australian Regulator Eases Licensing Rules for Intermediaries Distributing Stablecoins
data.description:
Australia's regulator has announced a new exemption allowing licensed financial intermediaries to distribute stablecoins without having to obtain separate regulatory approvals.
source: https://ihodl.com/topnews/2025-09-19/australian-regulator-eases-licensing-rules-intermediaries-distributing-stablecoins/

data.title: After three years of silence, the whale sold 2,086 ETH for $9.48 million, and still held 2,779 ETH
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, after three years of inactivity, whale 0x96a6D2AA93719DF9045e8e81a13fF25eE4E5935D recently sold 2,086 ETH at $4,544 per ETH, cashing out $9.48 million in DAI, USDC, and RLUSDC. The address currently holds 2,779 ETH, valued at approximately $12.6 million.

data.title: Trump and Starmer Memorandum Seal US-UK Pact on AI, Quantum Tech, and More
data.description:
President Trump and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer signed a nonbinding MOU to collaborate on AI, quantum computing, nuclear energy, and telecommunications, targeting applications in defense, space exploration, and advanced medical research. The agreement establishes a Ministerial-Level Working Group to guide projects and aims to drive innovation, economic deals, and global leadership in emerging technologies. The post Trump and Starmer Memorandum Seal US-UK Pact on AI, Quantum Tech, and More first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/09/19/trump-and-starmer-memorandum-seal-us-uk-pact-on-ai-quantum-tech-and-more/

data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty increased by 4.63% to 142.34T, setting a new record high
data.description: According to CloverPool data, the difficulty of Bitcoin mining underwent a mining difficulty adjustment at block height 915,264 at 22:47 last night, with the mining difficulty increased by 4.63% to 142.34 T, setting a new historical high.
